name: roadmap
displayName: Roadmap — idea to shipped, on a deadline
description: Turns one big goal into a dated, sequenced, measurable ROADMAP.md and holds you to it. A commitment device against exploration-loop drift: frame -> decompose -> map deps/risks -> sequence into time-boxed milestones -> write ROADMAP.md -> hand each feature to build-loop. Every milestone carries a deadline, a falsifiable done-criteria, and a hypothesis you later score. No Linear, no external deps.
